title: AXColorUtil
description: Utility class for color manipulation, conversion, and formatting operations.

sections.title: Color Utility Class
sections.description: Comprehensive color utility class that provides methods for color conversion, manipulation, and formatting across different color formats.

methods.name: parse
methods.description: Parses a color string into a structured object.

methods.name: format
methods.description: Formats a color object into the specified string format.

methods.name: toRgba
methods.description: Converts a color string to RGBA format.

methods.name: toHex
methods.description: Converts a color string to HEX format.

methods.name: toHsla
methods.description: Converts a color string to HSLA format.

methods.name: toHsva
methods.description: Converts a color string to HSVA format.

methods.name: lighten
methods.description: Lightens the provided color by a given amount.

methods.name: darken
methods.description: Darkens the provided color by a given amount.

methods.name: saturate
methods.description: Increases color saturation by a given amount.

methods.name: desaturate
methods.description: Decreases color saturation by a given amount.

methods.name: mix
methods.description: Mixes two colors by a specified ratio.

methods.name: isValid
methods.description: Checks whether a color string is valid.

methods.name: getContrast
methods.description: Calculates contrast ratio between two colors.
